user_features.skin_tone: Light to fair skin tone with a neutral-to-cool palette context.
user_features.hairstyle: Short wavy bob with bangs, dark auburn or burgundy-toned hair.
user_features.body_type_characteristics: Slim, petite-to-average frame with relatively balanced shoulders and hips; the outfit creates a straight-to-soft hourglass silhouette with gentle waist definition.

current_outfit.style: Minimal, soft feminine summer styling with a layered sheer maxi silhouette and casual streetwear accents.
current_outfit.color: Predominantly white/ivory with black accents from the shoulder bag and cow-print style sandals.
current_outfit.material: Ribbed or knit cotton sleeveless top, lightweight sheer lace or embroidered mesh maxi skirt layer, smooth black leather-like bag, and casual sandal footwear.

advantages: The monochrome white palette creates a clean, elongated vertical line, making the overall silhouette look taller and refined.
The fitted sleeveless top paired with the airy sheer maxi layer balances structure and softness, highlighting a slim waist and giving the outfit a modern feminine feel.
areas_for_improvement: The all-white outfit could benefit from one stronger accent accessory or subtle color detail to add depth and prevent the look from appearing too flat.
The sheer skirt layer is visually interesting, but a slightly more defined waistband or tailored top tuck could sharpen the proportions further.
